overall.description: A serene, high-quality CGI scene rendered in a game engine, featuring a solitary twisted tree standing in a vast field of white swaying grass. The camera remains stationary at ground level, capturing the mystical atmosphere as sunlight filters through scattered clouds, backlighting the tree while particles float through the cool-toned air.

segments.scene_description: A static, cinematic view of a solitary twisted tree standing in a vast field of white swaying grass, rendered in a game engine. The scene is backlit by bright morning sunlight filtering through scattered clouds, creating a mystical teal-toned atmosphere. The camera remains stationary at ground level throughout, capturing the gentle wind animation of the grass and floating particles drifting through the air, with distant forest silhouettes framing the horizon.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot presents a static, cinematic vista of a mystical landscape defined by a solitary twisted tree amidst a vast expanse of white grass. It begins with a ground-level perspective where bright morning sunlight filters through scattered clouds, casting a teal-toned glow over the environment. As the wind gently animates the swaying grass, floating particles drift through the cool air, enhancing the ethereal mood. The scene remains focused on this serene composition, with distant forest silhouettes framing the horizon under the soft, backlit sky.
